note: [ASSUMPTION] Demo calibration for the public Mall dataset camera (640x480, oblique). No surveyed reference points exist for this camera; the correspondences below are visually plausible estimates of the walkway plane (~12x9 m). RELATIVE density evolution and alarm logic are meaningful; absolute ped/m2 carries this tag. Real deployments: survey >=4 floor points and use scripts/phaseA_calibrate.py.
